log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Dragonborn — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Dragonborn — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Dragonborn — Winged Striker HP: 50/67
→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Dragonborn — Winged Striker HP: 30/67
--- Dragonborn — Winged Striker --- HP: 30/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:6+4=10 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
--- Dragonborn — Winged Striker --- HP: 30/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.

--- Dragonborn — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.

→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Dragonborn — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Dragonborn — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 18 damage. Dragonborn — Winged Striker HP: 49/67
→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 14] MISS.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Dragonborn — Winged Striker --- HP: 49/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:11+4=15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Dragonborn — Winged Striker --- HP: 49/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:18+4=22 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Dragonborn — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Dragonborn — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 11 damage. Dragonborn — Winged Striker HP: 38/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:7+4=11 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Dragonborn — Winged Striker HP: 22/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Dragonborn — Winged Striker HP: 2/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:20+4=24 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
══ ROUND 4 ══
--- Dragonborn — Winged Striker --- HP: 2/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (2/67). Going invisible for survival.
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Dragonborn — Winged Striker is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Dragonborn — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
